message.content:
# YSFLIX.COM Movie Detail Page Design Specification

## 1. PAGE STRUCTURE
The page is a single continuous scroll with the following vertical flow:
- Screenshot 1: Hero section (poster + movie info) → Tab navigation → Synopsis section header
- Screenshot 2: Full synopsis text → Download section (table with 5 server options)
- Screenshot 3: Cast List section (grid of actors with images and names)

## 2. MOVIE HERO SECTION
- **Layout**: Side-by-side layout with poster on left, movie info on right
- **Poster**: Square format (approximately 1:1 aspect ratio), contained in a dark blue card with rounded corners
- **Info layout**: Vertical stack below the poster with:
  - Title
  - Rating/year/duration row
  - Genre tags
  - Director info
  - Release date

## 3. MOVIE INFO DISPLAY
- **Title**: "Shogun's Ninja" - White text, bold, large font size
- **Rating**: Yellow star icon + "6.3" - White text, medium size
- **Year**: "2025" - White text, medium size
- **Duration**: "76 min" - White text, medium size
- **Genres**: Green pill-shaped tags with white text ("Action, History")
- **Director**: "Director" label (gray text) + "坂本浩一" (white text)
- **Release Date**: "Release Date" label (gray text) + "၁၀/၂/၁၀ ဂျ်" (white text)

## 4. TAB NAVIGATION
- **Tabs**: Two tabs - "Synopsis" (active) and "Cast List" (inactive)
- **Styling**:
  - Active tab: Green background, white text, rounded corners
  - Inactive tab: Transparent background, white text
- **Layout**: Horizontal row with equal width tabs

## 5. SYNOPSIS SECTION
- **Title**: "Synopsis" - White text, bold, medium-large size
- **Movie info**: "Shogun's Ninja (2025)" - White text, medium size
- **Rating**: "IMDb Rating (6.4)" - White text, medium size
- **Synopsis text**: White text, regular font weight, justified alignment
- **Metadata**: Technical details in white text (File size, Quality, Format, Genre, Duration, Subtitle)

## 6. DOWNLOAD SECTION
- **Table structure**: 5 columns - No, Server Name, Size, Quality, Resolution
- **Headers**: White text, medium size, bold
- **Rows**: Alternating dark blue/transparent background
- **Links**: Server names in green text (Yoteshin, Megaup, Usersdrive, Streamsb, Telegram)
- **Text**: Size, Quality, Resolution in white text
- **Styling**: Clean table with borders between rows

## 7. CAST LIST SECTION
- **Layout**: Grid layout (3 columns on desktop, 2-3 on mobile)
- **Cast members**: Each in a card with:
  - Square actor photo (consistent size)
  - Actor name in white text below photo
- **Image size**: Approximately 80x80px
- **Spacing**: Equal spacing between cast member cards

## 8. COLOR PALETTE
- **Background**: #1a2332 (dark blue-gray)
- **Card background**: #1e2a3a (slightly lighter blue-gray)
- **Text**: #ffffff (white)
- **Accent/Links**: #4ade80 (green)
- **Rating star**: #fbbf24 (yellow)
- **Genre tags**: #4ade80 (green) background with #ffffff (white) text
- **Table headers**: #ffffff (white)
- **Table rows**: Alternating #1e2a3a and transparent

## 9. SPACING SYSTEM
- **Container padding**: 16px (all sides)
- **Section spacing**: 24px between sections
- **Element spacing**: 12px between elements within sections
- **Grid spacing**: 16px gap between cast member cards
- **Table padding**: 12px cell padding
- **Button padding**: 12px vertical, 24px horizontal

## 10. TYPOGRAPHY
- **Font family**: Sans-serif (likely system font)
- **Title**: 28px, bold
- **Section headers**: 20px, bold
- **Movie info**: 16px, regular
- **Synopsis text**: 14px, regular
- **Table text**: 14px, regular
- **Cast names**: 14px, regular
- **Metadata labels**: 12px, regular, gray
- **Tab text**: 14px, regular

This specification captures all visual elements and their precise styling as shown in the three consecutive screenshots.
